E

EntrantHomeRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for check and add co-organizer

Constructs a EventDetailRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.

Callback interface for operations that success return a list of events

RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of entrants (users) with their names and emails.
EntrantNameAdapter() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EntrantNameAdapter
 
EventAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
RecyclerView adapter for displaying events for all events list recyclerview

EventAdapter.OnItemClickListener - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
 
EventAdapter.ViewHolder - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
The single view of events in the list display a image and a name contain the event id.
EventDetail - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Model class representing the detail of an event in the SyntaxEvents application.
EventDetail() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventDetail
Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.
EventDetail(String, String, String, String, long, boolean, String, String, String, String, long, String, String) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventDetail
Constructs a fully initialized Profile.
EventDetailRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for retrieving event detail data from the Firestore database.

Constructs a EventDetailRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.

Callback interface for operations that return data of the event

ViewModel for the filter in home page.

EventJoinRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for managing event waitlist membership operations in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
EventJoinRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventJoinRepository
Constructs an EventJoinRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.
EventJoinRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventJoinRepository
Protected constructor for unit testing.
EventJoinRepository.JoinCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for join and leave operations.
EventJoinRepository.JoinCheckCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for checking waitlist membership status.
EventLotteryRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for organizer-side lottery actions in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
EventLotteryRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventLotteryRepository
Constructs an EventLotteryRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.
EventLotteryRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventLotteryRepository
Protected constructor for unit testing.
EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for lottery actions that return a status message.
EventLotteryRepository.SimpleCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for simple success/failure operations.
EventViewModel - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Shared ViewModel for the event creation flow.
